original: Due to the highly sensual creatures that populate the universe, troops often experience erections in battle. To benefit from this, the Power Boner implant was developed. It improves the physical condition, energy and penis size during a hardon. Experimental data shows that individuals with a high sexual drive experience greater results. Characters with testicles experience testicle growth as well.
